flashy.services.acquisition package

Submodules

flashy.services.acquisition.acquisition_service module

class flashy.services.acquisition.acquisition_service.AcquisitionService(processing_config)

Bases: QObject

Central service responsible for managing acquisition and analysis pipelines.

This class orchestrates: - Acquisition worker threads (digitizer-specific) - Analysis worker threads (parallel processing) - Queue-based communication between acquisition and analysis stages

Each instance spawns multiple AnalysisWorker threads that process incoming data asynchronously.

The begin_acquisition method starts a new acquisition session using the selected digitizer backend.

Inherits:

PySide6.QtCore.QObject

results_changed
acquisition_finished
acquisition_results: List[BatchPulses]

Accumulated analysis results per channel.

analysis_todo_queue

Queue of raw acquisition batches waiting for analysis.

discard_todo

Number of discarded batches due to full analysis queue.

printed_todo_queue

Flag preventing repeated queue-full warnings.

discard_comp

Number of discarded completed analysis results.

printed_comp_queue

Flag preventing repeated completion warnings.

get_basic_dig_info(digitizer)

Retrieve basic information from the selected digitizer.

This method stops any currently running acquisition worker before querying the hardware.

Parameters:

digitizer (Literal["caen_dt5781"]) – Digitizer backend identifier.

Returns:

Dictionary containing digitizer metadata.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Raises:

ValueError – If the digitizer information cannot be retrieved.

begin_acquisition(signal_state_changed, digitizer)

Start a new acquisition session in a background worker thread.

Any currently running acquisition is stopped before starting a new one.

Parameters:

digitizer (Literal["caen_dt5781"]) – Digitizer backend to use.

acquisition_event_dump(batch)

Receive raw acquisition batches and enqueue them for analysis.

Parameters:

batch (list) – List of raw pulses.

analysis_complete(analysis_result)

Handle completed analysis results and store them in memory.

Parameters:

analysis_result (AnalysisResult) – Processed analysis output.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("AcquisitionService" inherits "QObject": Methods:   #4 type=Signal, signature=results_changed(QVariantList), parameters=QVariantList   #5 type=Signal, signature=acquisition_finished(QVariantList), parameters=QVariantList   #6 type=Signal, signature=_acquisition_started()   #7 type=Signal, signature=_stop_requested()   #8 type=Slot, signature=acquisition_event_dump(QVariantList), parameters=QVariantList   #9 type=Slot, signature=analysis_complete(PyObject), parameters=PyObject   #10 type=Slot, signature=stop_acquisition()   #11 type=Slot, signature=_on_worker_finished() )
stop_acquisition()

Request the current acquisition worker to stop.

shutdown()

Gracefully shutdown all acquisition and analysis workers.

This should be called when the application exits or acquisition ends.

flashy.services.acquisition.state module

class flashy.services.acquisition.state.AcquisitionState(*values)

Bases: Enum

DISCONNECTED = 1
CONNECTING = 2
READY = 3
ACQUIRING = 4
STOPPING = 5
ERROR = 6
